name: Cleon
sentence: Cleon is a butcher and cook enslaved to Grazdan mo Ullhor.

name: Dagon Greyjoy (Drunkard)
sentence: Dagon Greyjoy, called Dagon the Drunkard, is a cousin of Asha Greyjoy.

name: Dalla (Dragonstone)
sentence: Dalla is a serving woman at Dragonstone.

name: Durran Durrandon (Bronze-Axe)
sentence: Durran Durrandon, also known as Durran Bronze-Axe, was a Storm King of House Durrandon.

name: Durran Durrandon (the Dour)
sentence: Durran Durrandon, also known as Durran the Dour, was a Storm King who slew Lun the Last, King of the Giants.

name: Durran Durrandon (the Fair)
sentence: Durran Durrandon, also known as Durran the Fair, was a Storm King who brought Tarth into his kingdom.

name: Durran Durrandon (the Ravenfriend)
sentence: Durran Durrandon, also known as Durran the Ravenfriend, was a Storm King of House Durrandon.

name: Durran Durrandon (The Third)
sentence: Durran Durrandon, also known as Durran the Third, was a Storm King who attempted invasions of Dorne.

name: Durran Durrandon (the Young)
sentence: Durran Durrandon, also known as Durran the Young and the Butcher Boy, was a Storm King.

name: Erich Durrandon (Kin-Killer)
sentence: Erich Durrandon, also known as Erich Kin-Killer, was a member of House Durrandon.

name: Gerold Grafton (king)
sentence: Gerold Grafton was an Andal knight from Andalos who established House Grafton over Gulltown.

name: Gerold Lannister (king)
sentence: Gerold Lannister, called Gerold the Great, was a King of the Rock of House Lannister.

name: Grazdan (fat one)
sentence: Grazdan is a Good Master of Astapor.
